context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of 2. Remap GraphClient (src/graph/client.ts) from its stale tool-name catalog to tokensave 6.1.1's real tokensave_* tools with per-method result adapters, keeping GraphClient's external GraphResult contract stable. Then verify `agent-bober onboard` writes the 5 files via the real engine. onboard.ts is NOT modified.

completedSprints.title: MCP-compliant transport in TokensaveMcpClient
completedSprints.summary: commit 1441890 — call(tool,params) now sends the MCP tools/call envelope and RETURNS the unwrapped tool payload (JSON-parsed object from result.content[].text, scanning past any leading WARNING entry). So GraphClient only needs tool NAME/param/result-narrowing changes, not transport changes.

context.curatorFindings: Briefing has live-probed 6.1.1 wire shapes for all 9 tools. KEY: search->tokensave_search returns a top-level JSON ARRAY of {file,id,kind,line,name,score,signature} (adapts to SearchHit; field rename name->symbol). callers/callees/impact need a node_id (NOT a symbol name). file_dependents/test_map return string[] paths. tokensave_context returns plain markdown. overview()->tokensave_module_api needs a path arg and a stringify adapter to keep its string return. The EXISTING tests/graph/client.test.ts mocks call() with PRE-ADAPTED shapes and MUST be rewritten to RAW 6.1.1 payloads.
